accurate.why: Describes the special rule as applying to persons 'who have not received compensation for service-connected disability or death' — the bill text says persons who 'have not received compensation under chapter 11 of title 38'; the CRS paraphrase may slightly mischaracterize eligibility but this is minor paraphrasing of the same concept and not clearly inaccurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the slight paraphrase of the special rule is not a hallucination.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as increasing VA benefit rates matching Social Security COLA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the COLA-linked increases and Federal Register publication requirement.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the special rule for certain persons.

effective_dates.why: Does not mention the December 1, 2024 effective date, which is a material date specified in the bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the main provisions at a high level, including benefit categories, COLA linkage, special rule, and publication requirement.

correct_entities.why: VA and Social Security correctly referenced.

correct_figures.why: No specific figures stated in this summary.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
